name: [TEMPLATE] [seo_audit_orchestrator_plugin] SEO Audit Orchestrator — compose bricks → dedup → prioritize → work-queue → notify

nodes.name: Read Keyword Findings
nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Read Technical Findings
nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Read Rank Findings
nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Write Run

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ tenant: $json.__tenant, target: ($json.__target || ''), run_date: $json.__run_date, status: $json.__status, child_status: $json.__child_status, summary: $json.__summary }) }}

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Write Queue

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify(($json.__queue || []).map((t) => ({ tenant: $json.__tenant, run_date: $json.__run_date, task_id: t.task_id, url_or_entity: t.url_or_entity, issue_classes: t.issue_classes, severity: t.severity, merged_from: t.merged_from, priority_score: t.priority_score, impact: t.impact, effort: t.effort, recommendation: t.recommendation, status: "open" }))) }}

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]
